title: Phorolobus pteroides
taxonomy: Phorolobus pteroides is a species of fungus, specifically belonging to the genus Phorolobus in the family Hymenochaetaceae. This classification suggests that Phorolobus pteroides is a member of the larger group of polypore fungi. Within its family, Phorolobus pteroides is likely to be closely related to other species such as Phorolobus fuscatus. However, further research may be necessary to confirm the exact relationships within this family. The classification of Phorolobus pteroides is subject to ongoing scientific study and potential revision.
